ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_ABS_VDC_FD_PT_20210513
ddt:Target.Description:
[3]May 13th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Modified some items, based on Rev16.
[2]Apr 26th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Modified many items, based on Rev7-14.
[1]Nov 19th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified many items, based on Rev6.
[N]Oct 6th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Initial creation, based on Rev4.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to RoutineControl request

Data.Name: Config.Data_$4B24_#004_bit0_Tires real circumference or Front tires real circumference
Config.Data_$4B46_#004_bit0_Voltage Drop Management function inhibition state
Config.Data_$4B57_#004_bit0_Roller Bench Mode function inhibition state

Item.Text: when the malfunction flag are inhibited by diag(00h)
when the malfunction flag are not inhibited by diag(aah)
Ax monitoring is not inhibited by diag(00h)
Ax monitoring is inhibited by diag(aah)
development frames transmission is activated by diag(00h)
development frames transmission is not activated by diag(aah)
when the function is not inhibited by diag (c_AebsEvolvedDiag_Activated)(00h)
when the function is inhibited by diag (c_AebsEvolvedDiag_Inhibited)(aah)
when the function is not configured(ffh)
No Optional Signal EPB status Output(00h)

DataRead.FFD_$4B35_#004_bit2_(TBD)ASR inhibited by switch or maintenance mode strategy status

Item.Text: ASR Not inhibited by switch or maintenance mode strategy(00h)
ASR inhibited by switch or maintenance mode strategy(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$4B35_#005_bit6_(TBD)AYC inhibited by switch or maintenance mode strategy status

Item.Text: AYC Not inhibited by switch or maintenance mode strategy(00h)
AYC inhibited by switch or maintenance mode strategy(01h)
No Optional Signal EPB status Output(00h)
